game_name: Tactics Ogre: Let Us Cling Together

sub_pixel_system.notes: Turn-based tactical RPG; sub-pixel precision not applicable to grid-based movement system

special_mechanics.name: Grid-Based Movement
special_mechanics.description: Turn-based tactical RPG with overhead diagonal perspective. Units move on square grid structure with set movement ranges dictated by character class and stats.

special_mechanics.name: Wait Turn (WT) System
special_mechanics.description: Turn order determined by WT points which fluctuate based on action type taken. Unit weight and agility statistics impact WT gain per turn.

special_mechanics.name: Terrain and Weather Impact
special_mechanics.description: Terrain and weather conditions impact how units can move and act in each battle.

tier_notes: Tier 2 - Empirical/Qualitative. Tactics Ogre is a turn-based tactical RPG with discrete grid-based movement. Traditional platformer physics parameters (gravity, jump velocity, acceleration) do not apply. Movement is governed by turn-based mechanics, character classes, and tactical positioning rather than real-time physics simulation.
